name: SCC_PreChargeReq
title: SCC_PreChargeReq
syntax: void SCC_PreChargeReq ( byte SessionID[], float TargetVoltage, float TargetCurrent )
description: The callback is called as soon as a PreCharge Request is received.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF
